name: git
description: Version-control discipline across the full lifecycle. Per-verb skills — commit, push, CI watch, PR open/status/merge/cleanup, release, and a repo-health doctor (submodule + CI domains) — composed by a checkpoint orchestrator that takes a feature branch from a messy tree to a merged, up-to-date base. Submodule-aware (depth-first recursion); adapts solo vs team by reading branch protection.
